name: Kulolo (Taro Pudding) (Luau)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Line a bread loaf pan with foil.
3. Place the ti leaves on the foil, cutting to fit the pan.
4. Pour the pudding into the pan and cover the top with foil.
5. Bake for 2 hours at 400 degrees in an oven.
6. Remove the foil during the last half hour of baking to allow the pudding to brown.
Note: Kulolo was originally prepared with grated taro and shredded coconut, wrapped in ti leaves and baked in an imu (underground oven).
